zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Mcintyre於1368年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，她的父親The Free Booter Paul MacIntyre23歲，母親Hana Guldbrandsen19歲。她和Walter Ross of Rarichies, 3rd of Balnagown, 8th of Clan Ross至少有1個兒子。她去世於1412年在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾蓋爾洛享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mcintyre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an tSaoir ‘son of the craftsman’. Compare Irish McAteer .
History: This is the name of a Scottish clan which, according to clan lore, is descended from Maurice MacNeil, a nephew of Somhairle (English: Sorley or Somerled), King of the Isles (died 1164).

variants.name: McAteer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eoin, Nuala, Sean Patrick.
Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an tSaoir ‘son of the craftsman’. Compare Scottish McIntyre .

variants.name: Tyre
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow and Morayshire) and Irish (Wicklow and Dublin): shortened form of   McIntyre  .

variants.name: McEntire
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   McIntyre  .

variants.name: McEntyre
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   McIntyre  .

variants.name: Tier
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Down): variant of   McIntyre  .

variants.name: McTier
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   McIntyre   and   McAteer  .

variants.name: McIntrye
meanings: Scottish: variant of   McIntyre  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is 171.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Mcintyre was born in 1368, in Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, The Free Booter Paul MacIntyre, was 23 and her mother, Hana Guldbrandsen, was 19. She had at least 1 son with Walter Ross of Rarichies, 3rd of Balnagown, 8th of Clan Ross. She died in 1412, in Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Mcintyre est née en 1368, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, The Free Booter Paul MacIntyre, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Hana Guldbrandsen, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Walter Ross of Rarichies, 3rd of Balnagown, 8th of Clan Ross. Elle est décédée en 1412, à Gairloch, Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United King: Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Mcintyre 1368 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater The Free Booter Paul MacIntyre 23 und ihre Mutter Hana Guldbrandsen 19. Sie hatte mit Walter Ross of Rarichies, 3rd of Balnagown, 8th of Clan Ross mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1412 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Gairloch, Ross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Mcintyre è nata il nel 1368 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, The Free Booter Paul MacIntyre, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Hana Guldbrandsen, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Walter Ross of Rarichies, 3rd of Balnagown, 8th of Clan Ross. Morì nel 1412, nel Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Mcintyreが1368年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父The Free Booter Paul MacIntyreは23歳，母Hana Guldbrandsenは19歳であった。彼女はWalter Ross of Rarichies, 3rd of Balnagown, 8th of Clan Rossとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1412年にイギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアガイルロチで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Mcintyre(이)가 1368년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 The Free Booter Paul MacIntyre(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hana Guldbrandsen(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Walter Ross of Rarichies, 3rd of Balnagown, 8th of Clan Ross(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르 게어럭에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Mcintyre nasceu em 1368, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, The Free Booter Paul MacIntyre, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Hana Guldbrandsen, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Walter Ross of Rarichies, 3rd of Balnagown, 8th of Clan Ross. Ela faleceu em 1412, em Gairloch, Ross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Mcintyre родилась в 1368 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени The Free Booter Paul MacIntyre было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Hana Guldbrandsen, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Walter Ross of Rarichies, 3rd of Balnagown, 8th of Clan Ross. Она умерла в 1412 г. в местности геирлоч, росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Walter Ross of Rarichies, 3rd of Balnagown, 8th of Clan Ross. Murió en 1412, en Gairloch, Ross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años.
